prompt: Build a gym management system with class schedules and slot booking.

features.name: BookClass
features.description: Enables members to book fitness slots

business_rules: Members can book a maximum of 3 classes per day.
Cancellations must be done at least 2 hours before class starts.
constraints: SQLite database used to store schedules.

assumptions.reason: Standard gym class setups require multi-trainer tracking

features.name: BookClass
features.description: Enables members to book fitness slots

explanation.what_it_does: Enables members to book fitness slots

workflows.name: ClassBookingFlow
workflows.description: Sequential steps to book a spot in a class.

permissions.description: Allows user to view their registered attributes.
Allows user to view their registered attributes.

entities.name: BookClass
entities.description: Enables members to book fitness slots

entities.name: ClassBooking
entities.description: Logical booking slot reservation linking members to schedules.

entities.name: ClassSchedule
entities.description: Logical entity representing structured fitness class calendars.

entities.name: Member
entities.description: Logical entity tracking gym member profiles and details.

entities.name: Trainer
entities.description: Logical entity tracking certified personal trainers.

relationships.description: Links ClassBooking to its parent ClassSchedule record.
Links ClassBooking to its parent Member record.
Links ClassSchedule to its parent Trainer record.

workflows.description: Sequential steps to book a spot in a class.

business_rules.rule: Members are capped at a maximum of 3 active bookings per day.
business_rules.description: Members are capped at a maximum of 3 active bookings per day.
business_rules.enforcement_logic: Count(ClassBooking WHERE member_id = Member.id AND date = today) <= 3

business_rules.rule: Cancellations are forbidden within 2 hours of class start.
business_rules.description: Cancellations are forbidden within 2 hours of class start.

design_decisions.reason: Prevents duplicate direct schedules booking and enables clear auditing logs.
Required to delegate workload from administrative staff directly to class instructors.

nodes.description: Manages memberships and analytics
Standard members who book classes
Instructors who host classes

Allows canceling class slot reservations

Logical entity representing structured fitness class calendars.

Logical entity tracking certified personal trainers.
Sequential steps to book a spot in a class.
Onboarding billing transaction.
